tools.name: analyze_csv
tools.description: Analyserar en CSV-fil inom repo-katalogen.

tools.name: analyze_guitar_pro
tools.description: Analyserar en Guitar Pro-fil (GP3, GP4, GP5).

tools.name: bootstrap_semantic_memory
tools.description: Ingest key mq-mcp docs into semantic memory for use as review context.

tools.name: build_repo_context
tools.description: Rebuild the repo context artifacts used by the review engine.

tools.name: check_port
tools.description: Check whether a TCP port is in use on localhost.

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Create a new note in Notes.app.

tools.name: detect_architecture_drift
tools.description: Detect drift between declared documentation and actual runtime state.

tools.name: edit_image
tools.description: Redigerar en bild (resize, rotate, grayscale).

tools.name: export_symbol_index
tools.description: Write the current callgraph symbol map to generated/symbols/symbol_index.json.

tools.name: extract_coding_conventions
tools.description: Extract generalizable coding conventions from the last review of a file

tools.name: find_large_files
tools.description: Find files larger than a given size in a directory.

tools.name: find_recent_files
tools.description: Find files modified within the last N days.

tools.name: get_architecture_decision
tools.description: Return the full text of a specific architecture memory entry by ID.

tools.name: get_battery_status
tools.description: Return battery level, charging state, and estimated time remaining.

tools.name: get_clipboard
tools.description: Return the current contents of the macOS clipboard.

tools.name: get_last_review
tools.description: Return the most recent review findings for a repo file.

tools.name: get_public_ip
tools.description: Return the current public IP address.

tools.name: get_semantic_memory
tools.description: Return the full content of a semantic memory item by exact key.

tools.name: get_system_resources
tools.description: CPU, minne och disk-info.

tools.name: get_todays_events
tools.description: Return today's events from Calendar.app.

tools.name: get_wifi_info
tools.description: Return the current Wi-Fi network name and signal info.

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Show git diff for the repo or a specific relative path. Read-only.

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show current git branch, status, and latest commit. Read-only.

tools.name: hal_repo_report
tools.description: Run a read-only mq-hal repository report.

tools.name: list_architecture_decisions
tools.description: List all architecture memory entries (ADRs, boundaries, philosophy, rejected patterns).

tools.name: list_architecture_docs
tools.description: List all architecture documents with freshness status relative to server.py.

tools.name: list_local_repos
tools.description: List all registered local repositories by name and path. Read-only.

tools.name: list_openable_apps
tools.description: List all applications Bridget can open or control directly.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List files in the repository, excluding common cache/build folders.

tools.name: list_review_contracts
tools.description: List available review contracts and their modes.

tools.name: list_review_history
tools.description: List all files that have review history and their last review summary.

tools.name: list_review_skills
tools.description: List available review skills, their trigger paths, and extensions.

tools.name: list_running_apps
tools.description: List all visible macOS applications currently running.

tools.name: list_semantic_memory
tools.description: List all items in semantic memory with key, tags, and content preview.

tools.name: lock_screen
tools.description: Lock the macOS screen immediately.

tools.name: open_app
tools.description: Launch a macOS application by name.

tools.name: open_chrome
tools.description: Open Google Chrome, optionally to a specific URL.

tools.name: open_finder
tools.description: Open Finder at a given path, or at the home directory if no path is given.

tools.name: open_in_app
tools.description: Öppnar en fil i dess standardprogram (t.ex. GP8 eller Photoshop).

tools.name: open_messages
tools.description: Open Messages.app, optionally to a specific contact or phone number.

tools.name: open_repo_terminal
tools.description: Open a registered local repository in a new Terminal window.

tools.name: open_spotify
tools.description: Open Spotify, optionally to a track, album, playlist, or search.

tools.name: open_terminal
tools.description: Open a new Terminal window, optionally cd'd into a given path.

tools.name: open_url
tools.description: Open a URL in the default browser.

tools.name: open_vscode
tools.description: Open Visual Studio Code, optionally at a file or folder.

tools.name: read_repo_file
tools.description: Läser innehållet i en fil inom repo-katalogen.

tools.name: record_architecture_decision
tools.description: Record a new architecture decision (ADR) in the architecture_memory/ store.

tools.name: repo_signal_analyze
tools.description: Run repo-signal analyze on a local repository. Read-only.

tools.name: repo_signal_checklist
tools.description: Run repo-signal publish checklist on a local repository. Read-only.

tools.name: repo_signal_doctor_json
tools.description: Run repo-signal doctor --json and return structured doctor.v1 data. Read-only.

tools.name: repo_signal_inspect
tools.description: Run repo-signal inspect --json and return structured inspect.v1 data. Read-only.

tools.name: repo_signal_status
tools.description: Report whether repo-signal export packs are present, their age, and merge status.

tools.name: review_architecture_doc
tools.description: Review an architecture document against current runtime state.

tools.name: review_diff
tools.description: Review all files changed in the working tree or staging area.

tools.name: review_file
tools.description: Run an AI review on a repo file using the configured review contract.

tools.name: review_repo
tools.description: Review the least-recently-reviewed Python files in the repo.

tools.name: review_runtime_contract
tools.description: Review docs/RUNTIME_CONTRACT.md against actual runtime state.

tools.name: risk_review_diff
tools.description: Risk pass over all files changed in the working tree or staging area.

tools.name: risk_review_file
tools.description: Targeted risk pass on a single file with a declared risk mode.

tools.name: run_mqlaunch
tools.description: Öppnar mqlaunch i ett nytt Terminal-fönster. mqlaunch är ett interaktivt TUI och kräver en riktig terminal.

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Run pytest in a registered local repository.

tools.name: search_repo
tools.description: Search repository text using git grep. Read-only.

tools.name: search_semantic_memory
tools.description: Search semantic memory by keywords across keys, tags, and content.

tools.name: set_clipboard
tools.description: Copy text to the macOS clipboard.

tools.name: set_reminder
tools.description: Create a reminder in Reminders.app.

tools.name: set_volume
tools.description: Set the macOS system output volume.

tools.name: set_wallpaper
tools.description: Set the macOS desktop wallpaper.

tools.name: show_notification
tools.description: Send a macOS notification via osascript.

tools.name: speak_text
tools.description: Speak text aloud using macOS text-to-speech.

tools.name: store_semantic_memory
tools.description: Store or update a knowledge item in semantic memory.

tools.name: take_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot and save it to a file.

tools.name: toggle_dark_mode
tools.description: Toggle macOS between dark mode and light mode.

tools.name: tool_safety_report
tools.description: Return the documented MCP tool safety classification.

tools.name: update_repo_file
tools.description: Safely update a text file inside the repo by replacing exact text. Does not commit.

tools.name: validate_orchestration_contract
tools.description: Verify that the current tool set satisfies the orchestration contract.

tools.name: validate_project
tools.description: Run the local project validation script if it exists.
